content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-ollama Weekly Report (Mar 29 - 4, 2026)

## 🚀 Highlights
Development activity for the week of March 29 to April 4, 2026, was primarily focused on identifying a critical packaging regression. The project identified a configuration error affecting the installation process, which currently serves as the primary blocker for deployment. No new features or refactoring efforts were undertaken during this period as the team prioritizes resolving this distribution issue.

## 🛠️ Key Developments
There were no new features, bug fixes, or refactoring efforts completed during this reporting period. Development efforts were exclusively directed toward the investigation of the packaging issue identified on April 2.

## 🐛 Issues & Triage
### New Issues
*   **Packaging and Installation:** A new issue, [#22](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-ollama/issues/22), was opened regarding a failure in the `postinstall` script. The investigation revealed that `scripts/install-ollama.js` is missing from the published tarball, which prevents successful package installation. This is currently the primary active issue for the repository.

### Closed Issues
*   No issues were closed during this period.

## 💬 Community & Collaboration
There was no significant community activity or collaborative development recorded between March 29 and April 4, 2026. The project remains in a maintenance-focused state following the discovery of the packaging error.
